doctrine_enforcement_lines: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.

blockers.reason: ADL-016 belongs to Phase 6B General Ledger / FX gain-loss accounting and must not be represented as a Phase 6A sub-surface or seed.
blockers.required_human_decision: Confirm whether this manual-review dependency should block ticket generation, be converted to a hard/conditional/deferred dependency, or remain outside executable ticket scope.
blockers.current_conservative_handling: All Phase 6A executable-ticket promotion remains blocked until the manual-review dependency is resolved or excluded by explicit decision.
blockers.ticket_pack_impact: No longer blocks Phase 6A ticketability; exact-file/runtime-MCR control work remains required.
